subcodes.first_line: O my Lord and my God, O Light of Lights and Center of Mysteries and Attractor of the hearts of the righteous! With a heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ربی و یا الهی و یا نور الانوار و مرکز الاسرار و جاذب قلوب الابرار انی بقلب
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
